puzzle.title: The Dreamer's Ascent
puzzle.intro: A soul destined for greatness, yet tested by severe trials, embarked on an extraordinary journey. This individual's path was marked by jealousy, separation, and unjust suffering, only to culminate in a position of immense responsibility and profound reunion. Can you identify this remarkable figure from the Quran?
clues: I was once envied by those closest to me, leading to a profound separation from my parent and home.
I experienced a period of great difficulty, including being sold for a meager price by travelers.
I was unjustly accused of wrongdoing and spent years in confinement, yet my faith remained unwavering.
I was granted a unique ability to interpret complex visions, which proved instrumental in my path to freedom.
My wisdom and integrity eventually led me to a position of great authority and trust in a foreign land.
Through a series of events, I was reunited with my elderly parent and siblings after a long and painful absence.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being swallowed by a large fish
Building an Ark to save creation
Confronting a tyrannical ruler with miracles
Being tested with severe illness and loss

location.label: Key Element
options: A staff turning into a serpent

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Leading a migration to a promised land
Becoming a powerful minister in Egypt
Receiving divine judgment upon an arrogant people
Ruling a vast kingdom with wisdom and justice
outcome.answer: Becoming a powerful minister in Egypt

puzzle.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ يُوسُفُ لِأَبِيهِ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَبًۭا وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِى سَـٰجِدِينَ
puzzle.verse: [Of these stories mention] when Joseph said to his father, "O my father, indeed I have seen [in a dream] eleven stars and the sun and the moon; I saw them prostrating to me." (12:4)
